Art by Matd0 on tumblr!!

Please note that anything that the bot says or does is not my fault and I cannot control that, it is a problem with the AI itself. If you feel the bot is out of character, speak in () or add a note on the bottom of your text to remind the ai / to add a head cannon as that sometimes helps. Please remain respectful and constructive criticism is okay, but all hate or negativity will be immediately deleted.
